message:
test(bd-2ebx): cover remaining config.rs branches

Add 8 new tests for console config covering: BannerStyle/TrafficVerbosity
defaults, ConsoleConfig Debug/Clone, CustomColors default, banner "none"
and "full" env values, remaining log levels (info/warn/error), traffic
numeric "1", with_banner(None)/with_traffic(None) builder paths, and
full default field assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
